title: Vegetarian Pasta
description: Comforting tomato pasta with garlic, basil, and a silky olive-oil finish.
instructions: Boil the spaghetti in salted water until al dente.
Warm olive oil in a pan and cook the garlic until fragrant.
Add crushed tomato and simmer until slightly thickened.
Toss the pasta into the sauce and finish with basil.
Season to taste and serve immediately.

title: Chicken Rice Bowl
description: Savory chicken bowl with tender broccoli and glossy soy-garlic sauce.
instructions: Cook or reheat the rice and keep warm.
Sear the chicken until browned and fully cooked through.
Steam or stir-fry the broccoli until tender-crisp.
Combine soy sauce, honey, garlic, and sesame oil in the pan.
Slice the chicken and serve everything together over rice.

title: Coconut Chickpea Curry
description: Creamy weeknight curry with chickpeas, spinach, and warm spices.
instructions: Saute onion and garlic until softened.
Add curry powder and cook until fragrant.
Stir in chickpeas and coconut milk, then simmer gently.
Fold in spinach until just wilted.
Serve over warm rice.

title: Lemon Herb Salmon
description: Bright salmon fillets with roasted vegetables and lemon-herb finish.
instructions: Roast the vegetables until lightly caramelized.
Season the salmon and pan-sear until cooked through.
Finish with lemon juice and chopped parsley.
Serve the salmon alongside the vegetables.

title: Roasted Veggie Couscous
description: Colorful couscous bowl with roasted vegetables and citrus dressing.
instructions: Roast the chopped vegetables until tender and caramelized.
Prepare the couscous and fluff with a fork.
Whisk olive oil and lemon juice together.
Toss everything together and serve warm.

title: Turkey Chili Skillet
description: Hearty one-pan chili with beans, tomatoes, and lean turkey.
instructions: Cook the turkey with onion and garlic until browned.
Add chili powder and stir until fragrant.
Add beans and crushed tomato, then simmer.
Serve once thickened to your liking.

title: Tofu Peanut Noodles
description: Creamy peanut noodles with crisp tofu and fresh herbs.
instructions: Cook the noodles and set aside.
Pan-fry the tofu until golden on all sides.
Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, and lime juice into a sauce.
Toss with noodles and finish with cilantro.

title: Greek Chicken Wraps
description: Fresh wraps with chicken, cucumber, yogurt, and herbs.
instructions: Cook the chicken until browned and juicy.
Mix yogurt, lemon juice, and dill into a quick sauce.
Slice cucumber and warm the flatbreads.
Assemble the wraps and serve immediately.

title: Miso Veggie Soup
description: Light, soothing soup with mushrooms, tofu, and greens.
instructions: Warm the broth and simmer the mushrooms until tender.
Whisk in the miso paste gently off high heat.
Add tofu and spinach until heated through.
Finish with sliced green onion.

title: Beef Broccoli Stir-Fry
description: Quick savory stir-fry with tender beef and crisp broccoli.
instructions: Sear the beef quickly over high heat.
Cook the broccoli until bright green and crisp-tender.
Add garlic and sauces, then toss everything together.
Serve over warm rice.
